These cover OwnedCounter.increment and OwnedCounter.decrement which use access-controlled arithmetic storage mutations. SafeCounter.increment/decrement use checked arithmetic (safeAdd/safeSub with requireSomeUint) which requires safe-arithmetic/Option fragment grammar extensions beyond the current supported fragment. OwnedCounter.constructor/transferOwnership/isOwner use composition patterns (setStorageAddr without require, onlyOwner + setStorageAddr, local var binding + comparison + return bool) not yet in the grammar. These are deferred to future items (4.x or grammar extensions).

Introduced context-aware compilation with pre-populated CompileState and beq_false_of_ne for parametric string distinctness in compilation-shape theorems. 4 new RequireFamilyClausesTail constructors, 4 new SupportedStmtFragment constructors (34 total), 18 new theorems.
